data.content: Review result: request changes. The implementation correctly adds capability wiring, runtime reuse, tests, and clean targeted gates (targeted vitest passed; lint exited 0 with one existing warning in beat-form.tsx; tsc and build passed), but it does not satisfy acceptance criterion 1. The chosen interactive entrypoint is 'opencode session --format json' via buildOpenCodeInteractiveArgs(). On the installed CLI, 'opencode session --help' shows only management subcommands ('list' and 'delete'), and a direct invocation of 'opencode session --format json' exits with code 1 after printing that help text. Because the process cannot start an interactive stream, OpenCode cannot participate in claimed-step or take-loop sessions through the shared runtime. The fix should select a real stable headless/interactive OpenCode transport before re-review.
